feat.name: Zoophonic Communication
feat.text: Your studies have expanded your ability to parley and negotiate into the animal realm. You can Request from animals using Performance instead of Diplomacy as though you shared a language, although this gives you no special ability to understand their responses. You can also use Performance instead of Nature to Command an Animal.

traits.name: Bard
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the bard class.
